Inspecting the area around the vehicle, one of the rescuers saw the puppies under the jeep and decided to carry out the operation. As he bent down to pull out the puppies, others joined in to help him. The puppies were taken out one by one while the mother dog could not be seen anywhere - it is not known if she abandoned them or had gone out to look for food. Reports said the dog had given birth to four puppies under the abandoned police van.
